modules.title: Placement drives — use cases by role (with CSV)
modules.assumptions: College and employer already exist with an approved partnership. Students may be seeded or newly added. Flow: employer requests drive → college approves → students apply → employer shortlists / selects → optional assessment and offers CSV. Status pipeline (drive): requested → college approve (approved) or reject (cancelled) → students see approved / scheduled → application statuses: applied → shortlisted → in_progress → selected (or rejected / on_hold).

cases.oneLiner: View all placement drives across partner campuses (requested, approved, scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled)
cases.instruction: View all placement drives across partner campuses (requested, approved, scheduled, in progress, completed, cancelled)

cases.instruction: Filter drives list by one or more approved campuses

cases.observe: Validate as described for DRV-E03. Log pass/fail in manual_session_log.csv.
